children.heading: .—Federal Charter
children.label: a .—Federal Charter
children.text: National Academy of Public Administration (in this chapter, the “corporation”), incorporated in the District of Columbia, is a federally chartered corporation.

children.heading: .—Expiration of Charter
children.label: b .—Expiration of Charter
children.text: If the corporation does not comply with any provision of this chapter, the charter granted by this chapter expires.
